home.badge: Open Source ATS for Developer Teams

hero.subtitle: Open-source applicant tracking built for teams that self-host.
hero.hint: Early open-source release — try the demo with sample data, no sign-up needed

yourData.label: Your data
yourData.desc: Postgres + MinIO on your infrastructure. Nothing leaves your network.

auditable.label: Fully auditable
auditable.desc: Open source — every line of matching logic is visible and overridable.

unlimitedSeats.label: Unlimited seats
unlimitedSeats.desc: Add your whole hiring team. No per-seat pricing, ever.

retention.title: Privacy & Retention
retention.description: Configure privacy notices and automatically remove candidate data after your retention period.

policy.title: Retention policy
policy.description: Measured from the candidate's latest recruitment activity.
policy.enableHelp: Expired candidates are quarantined before permanent erasure. Existing data receives a review window first.
policy.quarantineHelp: Recoverable grace period before permanent erasure.

privacy.title: Application-form privacy notice
privacy.description: Shown to applicants on your public job application form.
privacy.defaultNotice: By applying, you agree that {organization} may process your application data to evaluate your candidacy. Your data is retained only as long as necessary and then deleted.

save.permission: Only admins and owners can change these settings.

review.title: Upcoming deletions
review.description: Candidates expiring, in quarantine, or exempt from retention.
review.instanceDisabled: Automated cleanup is paused by the instance administrator. Policies and review data remain unchanged.
review.empty: Nothing to review. No candidates are nearing their retention limit.

actions.holdPrompt: Reason for the legal hold (for example, an active dispute):
actions.eraseConfirm: This permanently erases {name} and all their data, and cannot be undone. Type the candidate's full name to confirm:

errors.eraseNameMismatch: The name didn't match. The candidate was not erased.
